calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-02-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as regularly scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Herbert Donaldson, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner, Keiry Delfina Canul Gongora present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Keiry Sofia Gongora Figueroa.
Decree signed in open court.
